_meta.shape: Each week is a saveWeek() payload: days[].availableHours are integer start-hours; days absent from source are emitted with availableHours:[] (consultant offered nothing). holiday is always false (source has no holiday concept).
notes: ernest: dropped 1 hour(s) outside working window 08–19: ['2026-04-07 20:00']
zane: dropped 1 hour(s) outside working window 08–19: ['2026-04-29 20:00']
